Which are your responsibilities? As DevOps Engineer you will oversee the implementation and administration of various application hosting platforms with the support of AXA Group expert teams. You’ll manage the automation of integration processes, of testing, of application deployment and all other settings of the available platforms. You’ll collaborate closely with our other Agile teams, Business and Support teams on fixing incidents, problems which could occur on the application platforms. You’ll guarantee the robustness of the platform based on defined recommendations. As team member of the Transversal Technical Team, actively supporting our internal and external customers, you’ll have an active role when sharing your ideas and efforts to continuously improve the deliveries of the team and the deliveries of the company. You’re enthusiastic about participating to our Cloudification journey. What are your skills and experiences? You have a degree in computer science (bachelor's, master's, or equivalent) Setup and administration of Linux system (Debian, Ubuntu, RHEL) Scripting: Bash, PowerShell, Python, … Containerization and Infrastructure As Code: Docker, Kubernetes, Helm, Terraform Knowledge on Cloud Infrastructure and SaaS Services (AWS, Azure, Google Cloud, …) Monitoring and logging: basic knowledge of Kibana, Grafana, Prometheus, etc You are comfortable with containerization environments (Docker, OpenShift, Kubernetes, Helm, Skaffold, …) and infrastructure as code principles You have in-depth knowledge in at least one of the cloud environments (AWS, Azure, Google Cloud) and cloud service integration You are proficient in scripting languages such as Bash, PowerShell, Python, or others. You are familiar with setting up automation, deployments via CI/CD (Jenkins), as well as automation tools (such as Terraform, Puppet, ...) You are familiar with the needs of monitoring, logging, and traceability of platforms (using tools such as Kibana, Grafana, Prometheus, ...) You have some understanding of managing complex platforms Assets Experience in creating and managing Cloud Resources Experience in creating and maintaining Pipeline (GitHub Actions, Jenkins) Experience in managing databases such as Oracle, MSSQL and PostgreSQL Experience in managing Java applications Participation on Open-Source projects What’s your profile? Flexibility is in your genes: managing changes and priorities is part of your daily routine You are interested in new technologies You have already worked in an Agile team You are focused on business needs and align your priorities with them As a DevOps Engineer, you have an analytical mind. Creativity and innovation are part of your qualities Thanks to your team spirit and communication skills, you maintain excellent relationships both internally and externally Dynamic and resourceful, open and curious, you work independently and proactively, and have a sense of responsibility You are inspired, passionate, and inspiring To work at Yuzzu, any experience in accident, fire, and risk insurance is an additional asset You are proficient in English and at least one of the two national languages (Dutch or French) What do we offer? A competitive salary with extra-legal benefits A friendly and open working atmosphere in a pleasant environment A diverse and motivating role at the heart of our company Autonomy based on your skills A good work-life balance, thanks to hybrid working setup Ongoing training and support Who is Yuzzu? Yuzzu is the Belgian market leader in direct insurance. Member of the Axa Group, Yuzzu is market leader in direct insurance in Belgium. Every day, our 170 staff are on hand to guarantee a quality and personalised service for our 150,000 customers and our partners. Yuzzu today remains a company that operates on a human scale. At its offices in the Tour & Taxis building in Brussels and at the 10 shops located throughout Belgium, the atmosphere is friendly and informal, reflecting the spirit of a young and growing company. Yuzzu attaches great importance to its staff and the quality of interpersonal relations. Because it takes a solid team to meet everyday challenges and translate them into effective and innovative solutions for our customers. Do you want to be part of our team? Apply now!

https://www.adzuna.be/details/5587116417.scraped: Informations générales Référence 2026-997 Métier SUPPORT - Technology & Development Intitulé de la fonction PLATFORM ENGINEER - DEVELOPER EXPERIENCE (LIEGE - BELGIUM) Contrat CDI Description de la fonction THE SCOPE With more than 30 years of history, Gaming1 is today one of the international leaders in both land-based and online games of chance (casino games, sports betting and poker). Its continuous growth, driven by innovation, is accompanied by the creation of high-impact and specialized engineering roles. As part of this growth, Gaming1 is looking for a Platform Engineer to join the Developer Experience team within the Platform Engineering branch. This role focuses on building and evolving internal developer tooling that enables Product Engineering teams to deliver faster, with less friction and more consistency. It sits at the intersection of software engineering, platform thinking, and developer enablement. You will join a small, focused Developer Experience team, responsible for building and maintaining internal tooling such as scaffolding tools, CLIs, templates, and the internal developer platform API. These building blocks compose into golden paths that make the right way the easy way for Product Engineering teams. You will report to the Engineering Manager and collaborate closely with principal architects, Product Engineering teams, and Infrastructure. The main objective of the role is to own, evolve, and extend internal developer tooling, ensuring high quality, strong adoption, and continuous improvement of engineering practices across the organization. YOUR ROLE As a Senior Platform Engineer, you will: Take ownership of existing internal tooling, scaffolding tools, and platform APIs, maintaining and evolving what has been built by principal architects and senior engineers Design and build new developer-facing tools (CLIs, templates, starter kits) as new needs emerge Contribute to golden paths by composing existing building blocks into cohesive, easy-to-use developer workflows Ensure tooling is well-engineered, maintainable, and aligned with the .NET ecosystem used by Product Engineering teams Raise the bar on code quality, testing practices, and documentation through example and code reviews Collaborate closely with Product Engineering teams to understand their needs and gather feedback on tooling Work with architects to align tooling decisions with the broader technical direction of the platform Profil YOUR PROFILE A minimum of 5+ years of experience as a Senior Software Engineer (Developer Platform or Internal Tooling) or Senior Platform Engineer Has strong expertise in: .NET development Building developer-facing tooling, CLIs, or internal utilities Software engineering best practices (testing, CI/CD, code quality) Has experience or interest in : Python for platform tooling Developer portals (React / Next.js, Backstage or similar) Kubernetes and container-based workflows Thinks in terms of platforms and products, with engineers as customers Is collaborative and comfortable working across teams and disciplines Takes pride in high-quality, maintainable engineering solutions Communicates technical decisions clearly and documents for scale Is fluent in English (spoken and written); French is a plus WHAT WE OFFER As well as having a unique experience - centered around our values of pleasure, team spirit, performance, boldness and integrity - alongside 1.600 employees around the world, we offer: the opportunity to contribute to the international development of a family company from Liège the chance to take part in a human and entrepreneurial adventure within a solid group a friendly work environment that is adapted to reaching optimal performance leadership by talents, values, trust and autonomy the opportunity to progress and specialize with our internal mobility system a competitive salary package with several perks The possibility to work remotely up to 50% for a good work-life balance THE INTERVIEW PROCESS GAMING1'S NEWS The Gaming1 Belgian hub moved to the heart of the Ardent City in 2021. Check our headquarters via this link. We are certified Top Employers 2025! We are the first game of chance company (casino, sports betting and poker) to receive this certification, among some 80 companies certified in our country, and including only 15% in Wallonia. Lieu Liège Critères candidat Niveau hiérarchique LK Confirmé

https://www.adzuna.be/details/5612427356.scraped: Join a multidisciplinary, multicultural, and international team at the forefront of innovation in transportation systems. As a System Engineer, you'll play a key role in analyzing, defining, and developing the architecture and functions of complex railway signalling systems used in modern train networks. Working closely with other engineering disciplines, you'll participate in the entire system development lifecycle, from requirements analysis to architecture definition, validation, and support for deployment. Your Responsibilities: Analyze, clarify, and confirm input needs and requirements (internal or external). Perform conceptual designs: system modelling, trade-off studies, real-time analysis, design mock-ups. Define system architecture, allocate requirements, and design system interfaces. Write and maintain system specifications using formal modeling and design standards (SysML, UML, etc.). Ensure full traceability of requirements across all documentation and development phases. Collaborate with RAM, safety, cybersecurity, software, verification & validation teams to ensure specification completeness and system integration. Lead and participate in technical reviews (design/documentation) and consultations with experts or end users. Monitor technology trends and contribute to continuous improvement initiatives (RoE, tools, processes). Promote standardization and system reusability by leveraging existing solutions. Support program stakeholders including customers, users, and tender teams. Profile / Requirements : Education: Engineering degree (Bachelor or Master) in Electronics, Telecommunications, Automation, Robotics, Electricity or a related technical field. Essential Skills: Solid command of English (spoken and written) with the ability to communicate clearly, concisely, and rigorously. Basic programming skills and good system-level understanding. Strong analytical mindset, attention to detail, and autonomy. Team player with proactive communication skills and perseverance. Nice to Have: Experience with system modelling tools and languages: UML, SADT, SysML, Matlab. Experience in specification writing and requirements traceability. Background in safety-critical systems (railway, automotive, aerospace, etc.). Understanding of railway signalling systems is a plus. Familiarity with both V-cycle/Waterfall and Agile development models. What We Offer: Opportunity to work on cutting-edge railway signalling projects. Dynamic and international work environment. Technical and professional development in a highly specialized and growing sector. Possibility of international missions and long-term assignments abroad.

https://www.adzuna.be/details/5628994967.scraped: At Johnson & Johnson,?we believe health is everything. Our strength in healthcare innovation empowers us to build a?world where complex diseases are prevented, treated, and cured,?where treatments are smarter and less invasive, and?solutions are personal.?Through our expertise in Innovative Medicine and MedTech, we are uniquely positioned to innovate across the full spectrum of healthcare solutions today to deliver the breakthroughs of tomorrow, and profoundly impact health for humanity.?Learn more at https://www.jnj.com **Job Function:** Supply Chain Engineering **Job Sub** **Function:** Process Engineering **Job Category:** Scientific/Technology **All Job Posting Locations:** Geel, Antwerp, Belgium **Job Description:** **Role Title:** Supply Chain Young Graduate - Chemical Production **Intake:** September 2026 **Location:** Geel, Belgium **Assessment Centre Date:** **23 April 2026** ( _Before applying please ensure that you are available to attend should you be selected._ ) **The Company** At **J&J** , everyone is committed to making a difference in people's lives and to push the boundaries of what science and innovation can achieve. The values that guide our decision-making are spelled out in Our Credo. Put simply, Our Credo challenges us to put the needs and well-being of the people we serve first: the patients, doctors and nurses, the employees, the communities, and stakeholders. Together with our more than 5,000 colleagues in Belgium, all with a heart for the patient, we strive for a future in which disease is a thing of the past. **The Program** The Young Graduate Development Program is a three-year rotational program designed to introduce recent graduates to all aspects of the Johnson & Johnson Supply Chain in Beerse, **Geel** or Ghent. The successful trainee for **this specific job positing** will be aligned to the **Innovative Medicine Supply Chain Geel - Chemical Production** function. We are also offering an opportunity within I **nnovative Medicine Supply Chain Beerse - Pharmaceutical Production.** If you feel this role is more suited to what you are looking for please search and apply to that vacancy specifically. **Important Note:** Should you wish to apply for the program, _please submit only one application_ for the function you feel best fits your interests and career goals. If your profile is a fit for multiple functions, please make sure to mention this in the video interview stage, if you are selected, and our team will take this into consideration on review of your application. **Why Join** **Innovative Medicine Supply Chain Geel - Chemical Production?** Johnson & Johnson Supply Chain Geel is our **Launch & Grow site** with over 700 passionate J&J employees and hundreds of partners working together every day to **safely produce** and deliver a broad portfolio of **life-saving, active pharmaceutical ingredients (APIs)** to our customers worldwide at a rate of **100 patients per second** . Joining the J&J SC Geel young graduate program offers the opportunity to immerse yourself in a culture of **innovation** . With our dedicated focus on **sustainability** through initiatives like Geel 2030, we're not just preparing for the future, we're shaping it. Moreover, being at the forefront of our industry means you'll be part of **launching** **4 out of 6 of J&J's most important products** right from our site. Take the leap and be part of a team driving impactful change, shaping both your career and the world around you. **The support** You will receive support for every project and can count on the experience of your Assignment Manager. Moreover, the Program focuses on personal development. Throughout the rotations the Young Graduate is coached by a Development Manager, focusing on a tailor-made development plan to fit his or her ambitions and aspirations. By creating a general overview of the business, the Young Graduate will be ready for a new challenge within the Johnson & Johnson Supply Chain organization. After these 3 years-the Young Graduate will look for a final placement within the company. The start date will be **September 2026** . **Qualifications** + You will obtain a **Scientific Master's degree** in **2026** in a **Bio (Engineering), Chemical or Pharmaceutical** field and have a strong interest in Production & Supply Chain + An additional **Master in Management** is considered a plus to develop the necessary business acumen. + You can work in a dynamic, fast-paced environment + You are flexible and willing to step out of your comfort zone + You are proactive, can take ownership + You have an innate drive to make the difference and achieve results. Thanks to your analytical skills you manage to understand complex issues and related business needs. + You are decisive and you have the brainpower and drive to deal with various issues and projects simultaneously. + Thanks to your communicative and interpersonal skills you manage to work together with different levels of our organization. + You are fluent in **English** and **Dutch** . **Join Our Team!** Become a vital part of our supply chain team in **Geel** and embark on a rewarding career that truly **makes a difference in the lives of patients** by delivering innovative pharmaceuticals. Your journey starts here-let's make an impact together! **Required Skills:** **Preferred Skills:**

https://www.adzuna.be/details/5595295212.scraped: We are looking for an experienced Cloud & DevOps Engineer to join our team and help us manage the infrastructure for a banking application hosted on IBM Cloud and deployed with OpenShift and Terraform . The application must comply with IBM Financial services certification , which is based on NIST 800-53 Rev 4 requirements, so security, automation, and compliance are key aspects of the role. Responsibilities • Deploy, manage, and optimize cloud infrastructure on IBM Cloud using Terraform and Helm charts . • Administer and Support OpenShift clusters, ensuring scalability, security, high availability, and cost efficiency. • Implement and Enforce security best practices to comply with IBM Financial Services certification, financial regulations and customer compliance requirements . • Monitor, troubleshoot, and optimize infrastructure and applications using tools such as Dynatrace . • Automate deployment and configuration processes to improve efficiency and reduce operational risks. • Collaborate with development and security teams to ensure best practices are followed in cloud deployments. • Contribute to incident management and resolution , ensuring high availability and performance of our solution. Required Skills & Experience • Strong hands-on experience with enterprise cloud platforms (AWS, Azure, or IBM Cloud) and their core services • Proven experience deploying and managing production with OpenShift or Kubernetes and its ecosystem. • Expertise in Terraform including module development, state management, and infrastructure testing • Track record designing and enforcing security controls • Proficiency in automation and DevOps tools (CI/CD pipelines, scripting, etc.). • Strong problem-solving skills and the ability to work autonomously in a fast-paced, dynamic cloud environment. Nice-to-Have • Experience in a regulated financial environment . • Familiarity with IBM Cloud, Security & Compliance tools. • Experience with policy as code tools (Kyverno, OPA Gatekeeper, ..) • Familiarity with container security scanning tools • Experience with monitoring and observability platforms such as Dynatrace, Grafana, DataDog, Elastic, .. • Knowledge of SIEM solutions and security monitoring tools. Why Join Us? • Impactful Work – Play a key role in managing a highly secure banking application in a cloud-native environment, ensuring compliance with NIST 800-53 standards. • Cutting-Edge Technology – Work with IBM Cloud, OpenShift, Terraform, and advanced security tools , continuously improving automation, security, and performance. • Challenging & Rewarding Projects – Tackle complex cloud infrastructure and DevOps challenges in a regulated financial environment, where security and reliability are top priorities. • Collaborative & Expert Team – Join a skilled team of cloud, DevOps, and security professionals , where knowledge sharing and innovation drive success. • Career Growth & Development – Enhance your expertise in cloud security, automation, and banking compliance , with opportunities for continuous learning and certifications . • Hybrid Working Environment – 2 days in office, 3 days remote, offering flexibility while maintaining team collaboration Ready to make an impact? Apply now and help shape the future of Gambit in the cloud!

Why Join Us? • Impactful Work – Play a key role in managing a highly secure banking application in a cloud-native environment, ensuring compliance with NIST 800-53 standards. • Cutting-Edge Technology – Work with IBM Cloud, OpenShift, Terraform, and advanced security tools , continuously improving automation, security, and performance. • Challenging & Rewarding Projects – Tackle complex cloud infrastructure and DevOps challenges in a regulated financial environment, where security and reliability are top priorities. • Collaborative & Expert Team – Join a skilled team of cloud, DevOps, and security professionals , where knowledge sharing and innovation drive success. • Career Growth & Development – Enhance your expertise in cloud security, automation, and banking compliance , with opportunities for continuous learning and certifications . • Hybrid Working Environment – 2 days in office, 3 days remote, offering flexibility while maintaining team collaboration Ready to make an impact? Apply now and help shape the future of Gambit in the cloud!

https://www.adzuna.be/details/5592349359.scraped: DevOps Engineer B2B Contract for 1 year and possible extensions Brussels Onsite 2 or 3 days/week Key Responsibilities CI/CD PipelineImplementation &Customization Adopt and implement the standard CI/CD pipelines (definedby the central DevOps team) using Jenkins , Git ( BitBucket ), and Maven / Gradle for Java ( Quarkus / Spring ), frontend ( React / TypeScript ), and test automation workflows. Customize pipelines to fit eEAD/iNM project requirements, ensuring compliance with central DevOps policies. Manage secrets and credentials in HashiCorpVault , following enterprise security policies. Monitoring, Logging & Observability Implementcentralizedlogging( ELK ) and metrics( Prometheus , Grafana )as per enterprise standards. Collaboration withCentral DevOps & Digital Product Team Act as the bridge between the Digital Product team and the central DevOps team, ensuring smooth adoption of standards. Work with developers and automation testers to optimize build, test, and deployment workflows. Performance Optimization& Troubleshooting Identify and resolve project-specific bottlenecks in build, test, and deployment processes. Optimize OpenShift resource usage for cost efficiency and performance. Implement auto-scaling and self-healing for high availability. Infrastructure as Code (IaC) – Terraform, Ansible Security &Compliance – HashiCorp Vault, Veracode, Trivy, Syft Monitoring & Observability – ELK, Prometheus, Grafana. Databases & Messaging – PostgreSQL, MongoDB, Kafka (Confluent), Solace PubSub+. Scripting & Automation – Python, Bash Collaboration Tools – JIRA, SharePoint, Confluence, MS Teams. Agile &Hybrid DevOps Model – Experience working in federated/centralized DevOps environments. Problem-Solving & Communication – Ability to bridge gaps between teams and drive project- specific optimizations.

https://www.adzuna.be/details/5623587524.scraped: Description Key Responsibilities Azure & Databricks Platform Engineering Engineer, operate, and evolve enterprise‑grade Azure Databricks platforms across multiple subscriptions and environments (dev, test, prod). Design and implement Databricks workspace configurations, cluster policies, pools, and job orchestration with a strong focus on scalability, reliability, and cost efficiency. Engineer and maintain Azure platform components supporting Databricks, including networking, identity, storage, and security services. Monitor platform health, performance, and usage; proactively design improvements and resolve operational issues. Databricks‑Centric Data & Analytics Enablement Engineer and optimize Databricks integrations with Azure services, including: Azure Data Lake Storage (ADLS Gen2) Delta Lake and Unity Catalog Azure SQL, Azure Synapse, Event Hubs, and other data sources Support batch and streaming data pipelines and analytics workloads running on Databricks. Partner with Data Engineering, Analytics, and AI teams to ensure performant, reliable, and secure production workloads. Security, Governance & Compliance Engineering Design and implement security and governance controls across Databricks and Azure, including: Azure Active Directory integration, RBAC, and SCIM provisioning Unity Catalog, data access policies, and cluster governance Engineer secure integrations using Azure Key Vault, Private Endpoints, and network security constructs. Ensure platform designs comply with organizational security, governance, and audit requirements. Infrastructure as Code & Platform Automation Design, develop, and maintain Terraform‑based IaC for Databricks and supporting Azure infrastructure (workspaces, permissions, networking, storage). Build and evolve CI/CD pipelines using Azure DevOps YAML pipelines for platform and infrastructure deployments. Promote engineering best practices for IaC, including modularization, versioning, automated testing, and environment consistency. Collaboration & Platform Leadership Act as a subject matter expert for Databricks on Azure , guiding teams on platform usage, architecture, and operational best practices. Work cross‑functionally with Cloud, Architecture, CICD, Data, AI, and Application teams. Create and maintain platform documentation, reference architectures, and operational runbooks. Required Qualifications 5+ years of hands‑on experience engineering solutions on Microsoft Azure , with a strong focus on Azure Databricks platforms. Deep expertise in: Azure Databricks (clusters, jobs, pools, Delta Lake, Unity Catalog, workspace engineering) Azure core services (Storage, Networking, Identity & Access Management) Cost optimization, monitoring, and observability for data platforms Strong experience with Terraform , including multi‑subscription and multi‑environment deployments. Proficiency with CI/CD pipelines, preferably Azure DevOps . Solid understanding of cloud security, governance, and platform engineering practices. Preferred Certifications Azure & Databricks Certifications Microsoft Certified: Azure Administrator Associate Microsoft Certified: Azure Solutions Architect Expert Databricks Certified Data Platform Engineer or Administrator HashiCorp Terraform Certifications HashiCorp Terraform Associate (003 or later) HashiCorp Terraform Engineer Soft Skills Strong communication and documentation skills. Ability to explain complex Azure and Databricks platform designs to diverse technical audiences. Engineering mindset with a strong focus on automation, reliability, and continuous improvement. Collaborative, proactive, and adaptable in a fast‑evolving cloud and data landscape.

https://www.adzuna.be/details/5589966438.scraped: Informations générales Référence 2026-999 Métier SUPPORT - IT/Infrastructure Intitulé de la fonction SYSTEM ENGINEER (LIEGE-BELGIUM) Contrat CDI Description de la fonction THE SCOPE With more than 30 years of history, Gaming1 is today one of the international leaders in both land-based and online games of chance (casino games, sports betting and poker). Its continuous growth, driven by innovation, is supported by strong local brands and deep market expertise. As part of this strategy, Gaming1 is looking for a System Engineer . This position is part of the Gaming1 IT department, which designs, delivers, and operates technical solutions for all land-based establishments of the group (casinos, gaming halls, sports betting centers) as well as corporate functions such as Finance, Human Resources, Legal, and Compliance. YOUR ROLE You won’t just “keep the lights on.” You will be a hands-on technical authority, ensuring that Gaming1’s infrastructure remains robust, secure, and future-ready. Own the Infrastructure : Act as technical owner of core infrastructure components, ensuring availability, performance, and reliability across corporate and retail environments. Secure by Design : Enforce security baselines, apply system hardening, and embed cybersecurity best practices into daily operations. Keep Systems Healthy: Manage lifecycle activities (upgrades, patches, replacements), monitor system health, and proactively prevent incidents. Be the Last Line of Defense: Provide 3rd-level support, lead root cause analyses, and implement long-term corrective actions. Automate & Improve : Eliminate repetitive tasks through scripting and automation, and continuously improve infrastructure efficiency and resilience. Profil YOUR PROFILE We hire for mindset, ownership, and technical depth. You are a strong fit if: You Are Hands-On : You enjoy being close to the systems you operate and solving complex infrastructure issues end-to-end. You Think Secure First : Security, hardening, and risk assessment are natural parts of your engineering approach. You Are a Problem Solver: You stay calm under pressure and enjoy diagnosing complex incidents. You Like Sharing Knowledge: You mentor less-experienced engineers and help raise the overall technical bar. You Value Rigor: Documentation, standards, and operational excellence matter to you. English Proficiency : You can communicate technical topics clearly in English (B2+) The Tech Stack (What We Use) You don’t need to master everything from day one, but curiosity and continuous learning are essential. Core Systems: Windows Server, Linux Identity & Enterprise Tools: Microsoft 365, Entra ID, Intune (Jamf is a plus) Virtualization: VMware, Hyper-V, Nutanix Security & Ops: Monitoring tools, backup & recovery solutions, security frameworks (NIST, CIS) Automation: PowerShell (preferred), Bash or equivalent WHAT WE OFFER As well as having a unique experience - centered around our values of pleasure, team spirit, performance, boldness and integrity - alongside 1,600 employees around the world, we offer: the opportunity to contribute to the international development of a family company from Liège the chance to take part in a human and entrepreneurial adventure within a solid group a friendly work environment that is adapted to reaching optimal performance leadership by talents, values, trust and autonomy the opportunity to progress and specialize with our internal mobility system a competitive salary package with several perks The possibility to work remotely up to 50% for a good work-life balanc Ready to level up? Send your CV and tell us briefly: What is the most complex infrastructure or incident you are most proud of handling—and why? THE INTERVIEW PROCESS Lieu Liège Critères candidat Niveau hiérarchique LK Confirmé

Core Systems: Windows Server, Linux Identity & Enterprise Tools: Microsoft 365, Entra ID, Intune (Jamf is a plus) Virtualization: VMware, Hyper-V, Nutanix Security & Ops: Monitoring tools, backup & recovery solutions, security frameworks (NIST, CIS) Automation: PowerShell (preferred), Bash or equivalent WHAT WE OFFER As well as having a unique experience - centered around our values of pleasure, team spirit, performance, boldness and integrity - alongside 1,600 employees around the world, we offer: the opportunity to contribute to the international development of a family company from Liège the chance to take part in a human and entrepreneurial adventure within a solid group a friendly work environment that is adapted to reaching optimal performance leadership by talents, values, trust and autonomy the opportunity to progress and specialize with our internal mobility system a competitive salary package with several perks The possibility to work remotely up to 50% for a good work-life balanc Ready to level up? Send your CV and tell us briefly: What is the most complex infrastructure or incident you are most proud of handling—and why? THE INTERVIEW PROCESS Lieu Liège Critères candidat Niveau hiérarchique LK Confirmé

https://www.adzuna.be/details/5628204161.scraped: Rejoignez-nous. Nous accueillons toujours à bras ouverts les nouveaux talents, donc n’hésitez pas à postuler ! L’ouverture est notre point fort. Ce n’est pas un hasard si notre nom What’s Cooking? contient un point d’interrogation. Nous sommes toujours curieux et ouverts pour de nouvelles idées. Donc oui, nous avons aussi envie d’apprendre à vous connaître. Êtes-vous aussi ouvert(e) d’esprit et entreprenant(e) que nous ? Dans ce cas, nous sommes impatients de faire votre connaissance. Nous recherchons un(e ) Reliability Engineer, pour les site de Wanze Votre mission : Votre mission principale consiste, À la mis en place d’un nouveau GMAO (EAM), à améliorer la fiabilité, la sécurité et le contrôle des coûts des installations/équipements tout au long de leur cycle de vie. Vous améliorez également l’efficience des standards de maintenance des installations en proposant des solutions concrètes afin de résoudre les problèmes techniques et de créer une valeur ajoutée maximale des équipements au niveau de l'usine et du groupe Quelles sont vos responsabilités en tant que Reliability Engineer ? Vous surveillez les fonctionnements des actifs/installations et les coûts et analysez la cause première des écarts avec les techniciens et les collaborateurs de production, pour aboutir à une amélioration. Vous soutenez aussi le Maintenance Manager pour l’établissement du budget et le planning des prestations, afin d’améliorer en continu le fonctionnement des installations. Vous développez et améliorez les concepts d’entretien, les implémentez dans le système IT pour la gestion d’entretien, afin d’aboutir à un programme d’entretien efficace, correspondant au niveau requis pour les prestations et les coûts du site Vous établissez la liste des pièces de réserve requises sur la base du concept d’entretien. Ensuite, vous déterminez la stratégie de sourcing requise, la criticité de la pièce de réserve pour les fonctionnement des biens/installations et les délais de livraison attendus Vous apportez votre soutien pour les projets d’investissement, la stratégie d’outsourcing et la définition et l’acquisition des compétences nécessaires pour l’exécution de l’entretien, afin de garantir le concept d’entretien et les visions apparentées Vous êtes le point de contact technique pour la modification et les changements de configuration des installations. Vous déterminez l’impact d’une modification, soutenez le processus de décision en matière de modification, et surveillez l’exécution de la modification et les actions d’implémentation associées, afin d’apporter la modification de matière maîtrisée. Vous vous tenez constamment informé des développements dans le domaine de l'amélioration continue, afin d'offrir un service qui repose en permanence sur des connaissances actualisées. Comment pouvez-vous renforcer nos équipes ? Vous possédez un diplôme de niveau ingénieur ou une expérience équivalente de minimum 3 ans de préférence dans les technologies agroalimentaires (fiabilité, maintenance, amélioration continue d’équipements et d’installations) ERP & Autocad Vous avez acquis une connaissance approfondie des systèmes de qualité courants dans l’alimentation Des connaissance en électricité et automation Vous avez piloté avec succès des projets intégrant notamment l’optimisation et l’amélioration de plans de maintenance et de fiabilité d’équipement Vous communiquez aisément en anglais et français, le néerlandais est un atout Vous avez un esprit analytique et critique. Vous êtes proactif, organisé, pragmatique et travaillez de manière autonome Vous avez l’ambition d’apprendre, de faire progresser votre carrière et de créer de l’impact Nous vous offrons : En tant que Reliability Engineer, vous contribuerez activement au succès de notre organisation Vous évoluerez dans un environnement passionnant, au sein d’un groupe alimentaire belge stable, innovant et tourné vers l’avenir, de réputation internationale Vous aurez la possibilité d’apprendre et de vous développer, guidé et soutenu par nos collègues, avec des possibilités d’évolution en fonction de vos intérêts et de vos capacités pour devenir un expert dans votre travail Une atmosphère chaleureuse et une approche personnelle vous garantissent de faire le bon choix Vous bénéficierez d’un package salarial compétitif, complété par des avantages sociaux tels que des chèques-repas, une assurance hospitalisation et un plan de retraite Nous attachons une grande importance à ce que vous vous sentiez chez vous dans notre organisation. What’s Cooking ? est une entreprise avec une culture ouverte et informelle, fière de ses réalisations, qui partage les succès et valorise le travail collaboratif Qui est What’s Cooking Group ? En tant que joyeuse famille diversifiée de food lovers, notre objectif est d’apaiser la faim de tous au quotidien avec des plats responsables. En tant que groupe alimentaire innovant, nous aidons nos amis épicuriens à garnir leur table de bons petits plats. Vous avez une envie soudaine de lasagnes, de pâtes, de pizzas, de cuisine du monde, de plats à base de légumes ou de spécialités régionales ? Aucun problème ! Vous nous connaissez peut-être via Come a casa®, mais nous fournissons également des services alimentaires à des professionnels, comme des hôtels et des restaurants. Depuis plus de 75 ans, nous privilégions chaque jour la consommation durable en proposant des plats aussi simples que délicieux qui sont préparés avec amour et dans le respect de l’homme et de l’environnement. Depuis notre siège social belge, nos 6 établissements industriels en Belgique, France, Pologne et Royaume-Uni et nos 5 bureaux de vente, nous poursuivons cet objectif tous ensemble avec nos 1650 collègues.

https://www.adzuna.be/details/5628204135.scraped: Ingénieur Processus (Automatisation) – HVAC & Automatisation des Procédés Industriels Lieu : Région de Fleurus, Belgique Date de début : 15 septembre 2025 Type de contrat : Temps plein Votre défi chez Arcadis Vous souhaitez contribuer à des solutions innovantes et durables dans l’industrie nucléaire ? Chez Arcadis, vous travaillez en tant qu’Ingénieur Processus sur des projets d’automatisation à fort impact pour les procédés industriels et HVAC. Vous assurez le fonctionnement optimal de systèmes essentiels à la sécurité et à l’efficacité de nos projets. Vos missions Analyser, valider et actualiser la documentation technique et les analyses fonctionnelles pour les projets d’automatisation. Participer à la conception, à la mise en œuvre et à l’optimisation des systèmes d’automatisation, avec un accent particulier sur la régulation HVAC. Rédiger les descriptions logicielles et accompagner la réalisation des essais FAT/SAT. Collaborer de manière multidisciplinaire avec les équipes projet et les clients. Votre profil Diplôme technique (par exemple en automatisation industrielle, électrotechnique ou mécanique). Expérience avec l’automatisation industrielle et les systèmes HVAC est un atout majeur. Connaissance des normes et réglementations pertinentes. Solides compétences analytiques et approche proactive. Excellentes aptitudes en communication, en français et en anglais. Ce que nous vous offrons Travailler sur des projets de pointe dans une équipe innovante et internationale. Des opportunités de développement professionnel et personnel. Un salaire compétitif avec des avantages extralégaux attractifs. Horaires flexibles et attention portée à l'équilibre vie professionnelle/vie privée. Postulez dès maintenant ! Envie de construire avec nous un avenir durable ? Postulez directement ou contactez notre équipe de recrutement pour plus d’informations.

https://www.adzuna.be/details/5625355787.scraped: Description Introduction Aperam is a global producer of stainless, electrical and specialty steel. With 9,500 employees of 47 nationalities, 2.5 million tons of flat stainless steel capacity in Brazil and Europe, and an industrial network concentrated in six main production facilities across Brazil, Belgium and France, Aperam is a truly global industry leader. As part of our manufacturing strategy, Aperam is reinforcing her efforts on Industry 4.0 to further strengthen her digital transformation journey. One of the key pillars in industrial innovation is the use of computer vision to rapidly accelerate the improvement of various disciplines from raw material, operation, quality, safety to automation. Given our strong growth demand, we are expanding our industrial innovation team to further support this development. Responsibilities You are: a passionate team player who possesses a deep understanding of the principles and technologies that drive the transformation of industries towards Industry 4.0 Your daily responsibilities will include: Utilising your strong background in engineering and your passion for leveraging data-driven insights to optimise Aperam industrial processes, contribute to the advancement of digitalization and automation in the industrial sector: Design, develop, and implement robust data architectures and pipelines which are outside of the standard IT infrastructure but specific to innovative solutions of required business needs to support data collection, integration, and processing from various sources, which in this case are often camera images, industrial sensors, PLCs. Ensure data integrity, quality, and scalability while considering the specific requirements of these specific innovative industrial 4.0 applications, develop efficient data integration processes to enable seamless data flow across different platforms and technologies. Work closely with business to understand the user requirements of application, provide fit-for-use data analysis and insights, using statistical analysis, machine learning (ML), artificial intelligence (AI), and predictive modelling techniques to derive actionable insights from these data sources. Industrial IoT Integration by collaborating with cross-functional teams to integrate industrial IoT technologies, including sensors, edge devices and communication protocols and technologies, to enable both real-time and deferred data intelligences. Integrate/ develop solutions with existing industrial automation systems (PlCs, DCS, SCADA) to enhance operational efficiency, real-time monitoring and control. Lead the IT integration of robotic applications (e.g. AGVs or robotic arms) by designing the data exchange between robot controllers, vision systems and the central IT infrastructure to enable automated decision making. Design and development of solutions particularly in user visualisation and interface to allow value generation in business applications. Stay abreast of the latest advancements in data engineering application and Industrial 4.0 technologies. Continuously update skills and knowledge to drive innovation and leverage emerging technologies Qualifications Skills and Qualifications Educational Background Bachelor’s degree in Electrical Engineering, Automation Engineering, Computer Science, or a related field. Software development experiences (>5) are strongly desired with successful track records using software development methodologies, version control systems, and software testing (SiL). Technical Skills: Proficiency in programming languages such as Python, C/C++, R, and SQL, familiarity with data manipulation, ETL processes, big data technologies, are strongly desired. Affinity towards current industrialisation data communication protocols (Modbus, Profibus, OPC, MQTT, ROS/ROS2), and Internet of Things (IoT) concept and technologies, including sensor integration, data acquisition, edge computing, connectivity protocols. Experience with robot programming environment (Fanuc, KUKA, ABB) and their connectivity interfaces is considered a strong plus. Experiences in Machine learning algorithms and frameworks (Pytorch, Keras, TensorFlow…) are a very strong plus. Soft Skills & Work Approach: Ability to manage and execute industrial IT projects, including requirements gathering, planning, resource allocation, and coordination. Understanding of project management methodologies like Agile or Waterfall. Result-driven: focus on the fast implementation and speed delivery. Fluent in English, some knowledge of Dutch/French is a plus to enable you to exchange with local operations Why Join Us? Work on cutting-edge industry in an innovative steel manufacturing environment. Be part of a high-impact team where your work directly improves production efficiency and quality. Enjoy opportunities for career growth , training, and working on global projects .

https://www.adzuna.be/details/5605456066.scraped: About Us Gramian Consultancy is a boutique consultancy specializing in IT professional services and engineering talent solutions. With a strong background in engineering and leadership, we help companies build high-performing teams by matching them with professionals who truly fit their needs. About the role Our client is a Managed Service Provider (MSP) delivering secure IT outsourcing and cloud transformation services across public and private data centers, supporting international clients from Switzerland and the Middle East. We are looking for a Service Desk Team Leader to take ownership of day-to-day service desk operations and lead a small on-site team in Geneva. This is a hands-on leadership position combining people management, operational oversight, and technical expertise. You will act as the technical reference for the team while serving as the main coordination point between clients and internal delivery teams. The role plays a key part in maintaining service quality, driving operational excellence, and ensuring high customer satisfaction during an ongoing organizational transition. You will report directly to the Service Desk Manager and lead a local team of approximately 5 people. Working model: HYBRID (3 days/week in office) Office Location: Geneva, Switzerland Contract: Permanent Note: Must be EU passport holder (no residency permit allowed) Interview Process: Intro Call + 3 client interviews (technical test, onsite interviews) Language: Fluent French and English Responsibilities Lead and manage daily operations of the Service Desk team Act as technical escalation point and subject-matter reference Coordinate communication between clients and internal technical teams Ensure SLA adherence, incident resolution, and service quality standards Support team development through coaching, feedback, and performance management Contribute to process improvement and operational efficiency initiatives Participate in reporting (weekly/monthly/quarterly as required) Support transition activities and evolving team responsibilities Requirements Minimum 5 years of proven experience in Service Desk or IT Support leadership roles Solid understanding of IT support processes, tools, and operational best practices Strong people management and team coordination skills Excellent communication skills in both client-facing and internal contexts Ability to operate in fast-paced, production environments CFC (Swiss Federal Certificate of Capacity) or equivalent IT education Benefits Annual performance bonus (minimum ~15% of monthly salary) Hybrid working model (2 days remote per week) Gym allowance Yearly fidelity bonus (paid in December)

https://www.adzuna.be/details/5598849191.scraped: Ready for a new challenge? Our clients are the leading brands in Europe, and they’re looking for a variety of digital talent for their teams. We’ll help you reach the next level with a job perfectly suited for your unique skills and aspirations. About Ariad: We’re the digital consultancy & staffing firm that leading A-brands in Europe count on to make digital transitions happen. We partner exclusively with brands like Samsung, Carrefour, ING, Orange and MediaMarkt. We bring together Europe’s finest talent and develop successful teams that create digital customer experiences that people want, love and talk about. Ariad consultants are specialized in digital marketing, e-commerce, digital communication, digital analytics, marketing automation, digital product design and digital transformation. About our role: Our client is a key player in collective and environmental services, driving sustainable solutions through innovation, ecological transformation, and digital monitoring. With AI‑powered optimisation reshaping water, waste, and energy management, solid IT foundations are more critical than ever. They are seeking a detail‑oriented and collaborative IT Administrator to ensure the reliability, continuity, and improvement of IT systems, networks, and user support. You will join a supportive IT team that values learning, transparency, and collective problem‑solving, contributing to the organisation’s digital infrastructure across several European markets. If you’re motivated to enhance system stability, user experience, and secure digital operations, this role is for you. What you will be doing: Maintain and optimise servers, data networks, and mobile devices to ensure smooth daily operations. Provide first-line support to end users, helping them resolve technical issues with clarity and empathy. Document standard procedures and system changes while creating accessible training for end users. Enhance and upgrade infrastructure components, ensuring reliable long-term performance. Secure IT systems and data through well-structured backup management and basic hardening practices. Install, configure, and test new hardware, software, and digital tools. Collaborate with colleagues in Belgium and internationally, including group-level ICT teams. Lead or participate in new IT projects, contributing to planning, execution, and evaluation. Travel occasionally to locations in Belgium, the Netherlands, and Germany when in-person support is needed. Work from the Grimbergen office or from home, depending on operational needs. What you bring: Ambition to further develop your career in system administration and digital infrastructure management. At least 2–3 years of experience in a similar role. Past experience in the collective or environmental services sector is nice to have. Your strengths include system & network administration, end-user support, and virtualisation fundamentals. Working experience with tools such as Office 365, Google Workspace, and VMware. Strong problem solving, communication, and collaboration skills. An inclusive, user-focused approach to technical support and teamwork. Fluent communication skills in Dutch and English (French is a plus). The offer: Contractor or employee collaboration Digital recruitment process and onboarding to the company. Work for a well-known European leader in ecological and resource management services. You will have the opportunity to work with a supportive, knowledgeable, and internationally connected ICT team. Working from home: Flexible hybrid working possibilities depending on operational requirements. Why become an Ariad Consultant? You’re joining an impressive network of +100 digital consultants and the Ariad staff, all dedicated to helping and supporting each other to succeed, and drive innovation. You will never be a number: we match you with projects that suit your skills and ambitions. Personalized follow-up & honest feedback guided by our Digital Talent Managers. Gain a rich community of other digital professionals at quarterly events and meetups. Join our annual Workcation event in sunny Southern Spain. Ongoing opportunities to learn and grow professionally including personal and professional development and guidance. https://www.adzuna.be/details/5578726198.scraped: Are you ready to tackle complex engineering challenges and contribute to the development of our next-generation vessels and mission equipment? As a Electrical & Automation Engineer at DEME, you’ll operate both broadly and deeply: involved in multidisciplinary designs while diving into specialized technical topics. You’ll work closely with internal teams across the business, ensuring seamless integration of systems and equipment used in our own fleet of vessels. Expect a high-paced, high-pressure environment where your engineering expertise will be crucial during concept & basic design phase of newbuild and conversion projects. This is not a management role - it's a hands-on technical position focused on delivering high-quality, compliant and innovative engineering solutions for complex projects.Your responsibilities Design and develop ships, hull structures, onboard systems and mission equipment – the electrical & automation part as your focus. Engineer systems such as electrical power plants, automation systems and auxiliary installations. Ensure all designs meet classification society and regulatory standards. Collaborate with internal stakeholders to define functional descriptions and technical specifications. Support the procurement process by validating compatibility with system designs. Introduce innovative, sustainable and cost-effective solutions to improve vessel performance. Oversee system integration, from design to commissioning, ensuring seamless functionality. Work closely with design offices, production teams and testing facilities to validate concepts. Prepare clear technical documentation, risk assessments and design reports. We don't expect candidates to tick every single box from day one - if you bring a strong engineering foundation and the right mindset, we'll support you in growing and broadening your skill set. Your profile Master’s degree in Electrical, or Automation Engineering. Strong technical background and analytical skills. A minimum of 3 years hands-on working experience in performing complex and multidisciplinary engineering scopes and system integration. Comfortable working under pressure in a fast-paced project environment. Excellent communicator and team player with a solution-oriented mindset. Accountable, action-driven, and committed to technical excellence. Willing to travel occasionally for site support and commissioning phases. Our offer A dynamic, technically challenging role in a key engineering team shaping DEME’s future assets. A collaborative and supportive environment with internal experts across disciplines. The opportunity to work on innovative, large-scale marine and offshore projects. Career development in a global company that values initiative and expertise. A competitive compensation package with benefits tailored to your needs.

atout Envie de relever les défis multi-techniques de demain ? Alors rejoignez dès à présent Equans, et venez construire une carrière passionnante au sein d’une entreprise stable et en excellente santé financière. Des projets variés et stimulants vous attendent, tout en accompagnant nos clients dans les 3 grandes transitions actuelles : la transition énergétique, la transition industrielle et la transition digitale. Vous aurez également l’occasion de découvrir les technologies de demain, en développant chaque jour vos compétences. Mais ce n’est pas tout, rejoindre Equans, c'est aussi : un salaire compétitif, conforme à votre formation et expérience de belles opportunités de formation et de développement une assurance groupe & hospitalisation des écochèques, chèques-repas, frais de représentation, 13ème mois, pécule de vacances un abonnement social, voiture de société avec carte recharge électrique, plan de leasing vélo un smartphone avec abonnement, intervention internet des congés RTT, congés d’ancienneté, télétravail des réductions via Benefits@Work (culture, sport, voyages, etc.) Sans oublier l’ambiance authentique et conviviale propre à Equans, qui fait toute la différence. Alors, qu’attendez-vous ? Nous avons hâte de vous accueillir parmi nous ! Chez Equans, nous ne nous contentons pas d’offrir des jobs ; nous créons des opportunités d’emploi qui font la différence. En tant que leader mondial dans les domaines de l'énergie et des services , nous vous invitons à prendre part à une aventure passionnante : rejoindre 10 000 collègues passionnés dont la mission réside à trouver les meilleures réponses aux trois grandes transitions (digitale, industrielle et énergétique) de notre époque. Concrètement ? Nous rendons les industries, les bâtiments, les infrastructures de transports et réseaux de distribution plus sûrs, performants et économes en énergie. Que vous soyez au début de votre carrière ou désireux de renforcer vos compétences, vous trouverez chez nous le soutien, les outils et l'inspiration nécessaires pour vous épanouir. De l’ingénierie à l’IT, en passant par le digital & automation, l’électricité, l’HVAC, la gestion de projet, ou les services de support, notre panel d’expertises offre une multitude d’opportunités. Développez votre carrière et vous-même Chez Equans, nous valorisons votre développement personnel : la formation continue est non seulement encouragée, mais fait réellement partie de notre culture d'entreprise. Nous ne voyons pas cela comme un coût, mais comme un investissement dans votre avenir. Grâce à notre programme d’apprentissage, passez d’apprenti à expert tout en découvrant divers métiers passionnants. Cet apprentissage ne se limite pas à la formation mais englobe aussi l’expérience acquise sur le terrain enrichie par la transmission de savoir de vos collègues ! Soyez fier de travailler sur des projets qui comptent Imaginez pouvoir dire à votre famille : « J’ai contribué à ce projet ! ». Chez Equans, nos collègues sont fiers de travailler sur des initiatives qui font la différence. Des hôpitaux aux réseaux de transport, chaque projet a un impact direct sur notre quotidien et contribue à dynamiser notre économie. Intégrez des équipe qui se soutiennent. Nous formons une tribu de collègues enthousiastes et entrepreneuriaux. Chacun d'entre nous a une personnalité et un ensemble d'idées uniques, unis par l'envie de réaliser des choses passionnantes. Nous pouvons compter les uns sur les autres. Equans en chiffres, c’est : Plus de 8000 projets gérés par près de 10 000 collègues répartis sur plus de 60 sites en Belgique et probablement plus de 40 000 boissons chaudes partagées chaque jour (et avec le sourire).

minimum 1 an d’expérience équivalente la maîtrise d’au moins un système tel que PLC Siemens S7, TIA Portal, PCS7, WinCC, Schneider, PLC Rockwell, Wonderware Intouch (Archestra) ou un système DCS DeltaV Emerson des notions en instrumentation, régulation, actionneurs, Ethernet/Profibus/Profinet, variateurs AC/DC, régulation PID, Grafcet ou SQL la capacité à comprendre, analyser et résoudre des problèmes techniques complexes l’habitude de rédiger des documents techniques : analyses fonctionnelles, modes opératoires, rapports, fiches, cahiers des charges le respect strict des règles de sécurité une bonne maîtrise d’Office 365 (Word, Excel, Outlook) une aisance avec les outils collaboratifs comme OneNote, SharePoint ou Teams de la précision, du pragmatisme et de la rigueur le goût du travail en équipe tout en sachant travailler de manière autonome un contact client fluide et naturel un bon esprit de synthèse et une orientation terrain une ouverture au changement et l’envie de contribuer à l’amélioration des méthodes une bonne capacité à estimer le temps des tâches et à gérer un planning la maîtrise du français (écrit et oral), avec une bonne orthographe l’anglais comme atout Envie de relever les défis multi-techniques de demain ? Alors rejoignez dès à présent Equans, et venez construire une carrière passionnante au sein d’une entreprise stable et en excellente santé financière. Des projets variés et stimulants vous attendent, tout en accompagnant nos clients dans les 3 grandes transitions actuelles : la transition énergétique, la transition industrielle et la transition digitale. Vous aurez également l’occasion de découvrir les technologies de demain, en développant chaque jour vos compétences. Mais ce n’est pas tout, rejoindre Equans, c'est aussi : un salaire compétitif, conforme à votre formation et expérience de belles opportunités de formation et de développement une assurance groupe & hospitalisation des écochèques, chèques-repas, frais de représentation, 13ème mois, pécule de vacances un abonnement social, voiture de société avec carte recharge électrique, plan de leasing vélo un smartphone avec abonnement, intervention internet des congés RTT, congés d’ancienneté, télétravail des réductions via Benefits@Work (culture, sport, voyages, etc.) Sans oublier l’ambiance authentique et conviviale propre à Equans, qui fait toute la différence. Alors, qu’attendez-vous ? Nous avons hâte de vous accueillir parmi nous ! Chez Equans, nous ne nous contentons pas d’offrir des jobs ; nous créons des opportunités d’emploi qui font la différence. En tant que leader mondial dans les domaines de l'énergie et des services , nous vous invitons à prendre part à une aventure passionnante : rejoindre 10 000 collègues passionnés dont la mission réside à trouver les meilleures réponses aux trois grandes transitions (digitale, industrielle et énergétique) de notre époque. Concrètement ? Nous rendons les industries, les bâtiments, les infrastructures de transports et réseaux de distribution plus sûrs, performants et économes en énergie. Que vous soyez au début de votre carrière ou désireux de renforcer vos compétences, vous trouverez chez nous le soutien, les outils et l'inspiration nécessaires pour vous épanouir. De l’ingénierie à l’IT, en passant par le digital & automation, l’électricité, l’HVAC, la gestion de projet, ou les services de support, notre panel d’expertises offre une multitude d’opportunités. Développez votre carrière et vous-même Chez Equans, nous valorisons votre développement personnel : la formation continue est non seulement encouragée, mais fait réellement partie de notre culture d'entreprise. Nous ne voyons pas cela comme un coût, mais comme un investissement dans votre avenir. Grâce à notre programme d’apprentissage, passez d’apprenti à expert tout en découvrant divers métiers passionnants. Cet apprentissage ne se limite pas à la formation mais englobe aussi l’expérience acquise sur le terrain enrichie par la transmission de savoir de vos collègues ! Soyez fier de travailler sur des projets qui comptent Imaginez pouvoir dire à votre famille : « J’ai contribué à ce projet ! ». Chez Equans, nos collègues sont fiers de travailler sur des initiatives qui font la différence. Des hôpitaux aux réseaux de transport, chaque projet a un impact direct sur notre quotidien et contribue à dynamiser notre économie. Intégrez des équipe qui se soutiennent. Nous formons une tribu de collègues enthousiastes et entrepreneuriaux. Chacun d'entre nous a une personnalité et un ensemble d'idées uniques, unis par l'envie de réaliser des choses passionnantes. Nous pouvons compter les uns sur les autres. Equans en chiffres, c’est : Plus de 8000 projets gérés par près de 10 000 collègues répartis sur plus de 60 sites en Belgique et probablement plus de 40 000 boissons chaudes partagées chaque jour (et avec le sourire).

Hosting, un groupe d'experts IT passionnés qui pilotent la conception, l'optimisation et la migration de notre infrastructure serveur - des environnements on-premises vers le cloud. Nous recherchons un ingénieur Linux motivé, prêt à relever des défis stimulants et à évoluer avec nous. En tant que System Engineer Linux, vous contribuerez activement à des initiatives stratégiques qui façonnent l'avenir de notre infrastructure. Parmi les projets auxquels vous participerez : la rationalisation de Tomcat, la mise à niveau et l'installation de systèmes d'exploitation ainsi que le support des mises à jour applicatives, la migration d'applications vers AWS, l'optimisation de la supervision des environnements et la mise en place d'une gestion des certifications. Ce que vous apportez: Expérience en administration de systèmes Linux Familiarité avec Terraform & Ansible (IaC) Scripting Python pour l'automatisation Scripting Bash Connaissance de Kubernetes (OpenShift, EKS) Esprit collaboratif avec les équipes de développement Ce que vous apprendrez (ou approfondirez) avec nous: Bases de Windows Server Outils de monitoring (Prometheus, Grafana, ELK) Pipelines CI/CD (GitLab CI, Jenkins) Notions de réseau pour le cloud et les conteneurs Infrastructure AWS Les compétences que nous valorisons: Solides compétences en résolution de problèmes et en analyse Communication claire et efficace Collaboration en équipe dans des environnements agiles Capacité d'adaptation aux évolutions technologiques Esprit orienté client Capacité à coordonner des tâches et à contribuer à la planification de projets Intérêt pour le mentorat et le partage de connaissances Aisance à rédiger une documentation technique claire et structure Compétences linguistiques : bonne maîtrise du français et du néerlandais, ainsi qu'une bonne compréhension de l'anglais. - Type de contrat: durée indéterminée - Lieu de travail: Bruxelles et/ou Anvers en combinaison avec le télétravail - Avantages extra légaux: Le Groupe P&V offre de nombreux avantages extra légaux tels que des chèques-repas, une assurance hospitalisation et une assurance groupe, des écochèques, un restaurant d'entreprise, un plan cafétaria, des horaires flexibles et des possibilités de télétravail, ainsi que d'autres avantages auprès de nombreux partenaires. Pourquoi travailler pour le Groupe P&V ? - Le Groupe P&V est une compagnie d'assurances coopérative qui vise à rendre les assurances accessibles au plus grand nombre et participer à la construction d'un monde solidaire via plusieurs initiatives telles que la Fondation P&V. - Nous sommes un groupe belge, ce qui signifie que toutes les décisions sont également prises en Belgique. - Le Groupe place l'humain au centre de ses préoccupations, tant ses collaborateurs que ses clients. Nous souhaitons rester un groupe à valeur humaine tout en gardant une place de choix dans le marché belge des assurances. Le Groupe P&V soutient une politique de diversité et d'inclusion lors du recrutement de ses collaborateurs. ... Ansible, Langage de script, Project planning, Python, Prêt, Administration, Surveillance, Jenkins, Amazon Web Services, Grafana, Optimisation, Frans, Hosting, Automatisering, Jenkins, Migration, Linux, Infrastructure, Bash, Développement, Grafana, Design, Upgrades management, GitLab, Aanpassingsvermogen, Linux, Mentoraat, Communication, Cloud, Cloud, GitLab, Communicatie, Schrijven, Engelse taal, Analyse, Supervision, Nederlands, CD, Adaptations, Project planning Originele vacature is te vinden op StepStone.be – Maak nu een Jobagent aan op StepStone en vind je droombaan! https://bit.ly/2jPYsZC Vi

active:bg-adzuna-green-700 text-center block m-4 md:mx-0 md:my-4 md:inline-block " Solliciteren /a section class="adp-body mx-4 mb-4 text-sm md:mx-0 md:text-base md:mb-0" Rejoignez notre équipe Hosting, un groupe d'experts IT passionnés qui pilotent la conception, l'optimisation et la migration de notre infrastructure serveur - des environnements on-premises vers le cloud. Nous recherchons un ingénieur Linux motivé, prêt à relever des défis stimulants et à évoluer avec nous. En tant que System Engineer Linux, vous contribuerez activement à des initiatives stratégiques qui façonnent l'avenir de notre infrastructure. Parmi les projets auxquels vous participerez : la rationalisation de Tomcat, la mise à niveau et l'installation de systèmes d'exploitation ainsi que le support des mises à jour applicatives, la migration d'applications vers AWS, l'optimisation de la supervision des environnements et la mise en place d'une gestion des certifications. Ce que vous apportez: Expérience en administration de systèmes Linux Familiarité avec Terraform & Ansible (IaC) Scripting Python pour l'automatisation Scripting Bash Connaissance de Kubernetes (OpenShift, EKS) Esprit collaboratif avec les équipes de développement Ce que vous apprendrez (ou approfondirez) avec nous: Bases de Windows Server Outils de monitoring (Prometheus, Grafana, ELK) Pipelines CI/CD (GitLab CI, Jenkins) Notions de réseau pour le cloud et les conteneurs Infrastructure AWS Les compétences que nous valorisons: Solides compétences en résolution de problèmes et en analyse Communication claire et efficace Collaboration en équipe dans des environnements agiles Capacité d'adaptation aux évolutions technologiques Esprit orienté client Capacité à coordonner des tâches et à contribuer à la planification de projets Intérêt pour le mentorat et le partage de connaissances Aisance à rédiger une documentation technique claire et structure Compétences linguistiques : bonne maîtrise du français et du néerlandais, ainsi qu'une bonne compréhension de l'anglais. - Type de contrat: durée indéterminée - Lieu de travail: Bruxelles et/ou Anvers en combinaison avec le télétravail - Avantages extra légaux: Le Groupe P&V offre de nombreux avantages extra légaux tels que des chèques-repas, une assurance hospitalisation et une assurance groupe, des écochèques, un restaurant d'entreprise, un plan cafétaria, des horaires flexibles et des possibilités de télétravail, ainsi que d'autres avantages auprès de nombreux partenaires. Pourquoi travailler pour le Groupe P&V ? - Le Groupe P&V est une compagnie d'assurances coopérative qui vise à rendre les assurances accessibles au plus grand nombre et participer à la construction d'un monde solidaire via plusieurs initiatives telles que la Fondation P&V. - Nous sommes un groupe belge, ce qui signifie que toutes les décisions sont également prises en Belgique. - Le Groupe place l'humain au centre de ses préoccupations, tant ses collaborateurs que ses clients. Nous souhaitons rester un groupe à valeur humaine tout en gardant une place de choix dans le marché belge des assurances. Le Groupe P&V soutient une politique de diversité et d'inclusion lors du recrutement de ses collaborateurs. ... https://www.adzuna.be/details/5620270426.scraped: À propos de l'entreprise La Clinique Saint-Jean s’engage dans une transformation numérique majeure avec le déploiement d’un dossier patient intégré (EPIC) en collaboration avec les Cliniques Universitaires Saint-Luc. Ce projet implique une refonte et une harmonisation profondes des applications, des processus et des flux de données entre les deux hôpitaux. Il offre aux professionnels des TIC une opportunité unique de participer à la création d’un environnement numérique intégré, ambitieux et orienté vers l’avenir. À propos du rôle Votre mission: L'ingénieur système informatique assure le support et la maintenance de l'infrastructure serveur, des environnements de travail des utilisateurs finaux et effectue des tâches dans le domaine des réseaux. Ce poste requiert une personne proactive dotée d'une solide expérience technique, d'excellentes compétences en matière de résolution de problèmes et d'une grande soif d'apprendre. Responsabilités Gestion et maintenance des environnements Windows Server (Active Directory, stratégie de groupe, DNS, DHCP). Gestion des plateformes de virtualisation VMware (vSphere, ESXi). Mise en œuvre et surveillance des solutions de sauvegarde et de reprise après sinistre à l'aide de Veeam Backup & Replication. Configuration et maintenance de Microsoft System Center Configuration Management (SCCM, Intune). Veiller au respect des meilleures pratiques en matière de sécurité dans tous les systèmes. Fournir une assistance pour Microsoft Intune pour la gestion des appareils et la sécurité des terminaux. Résolution de problèmes liés à des infrastructures complexes et assistance de 2e/3e niveau. Participation à des projets d'infrastructure et contribution aux décisions architecturales. Qualifications Master en technologies de l'information, en informatique ou équivalent grâce à une expérience pertinente. Minimum 3 à 5 ans d'expérience en ingénierie des systèmes informatiques. Connaissance approfondie de : l'administration de Windows Server, la virtualisation VMware, les solutions de sauvegarde Veeam, la suite Microsoft System Center. Connaissance de : la sécurité et la conformité des terminaux, Microsoft Intune et la gestion moderne des appareils. Compréhension des principes fondamentaux des réseaux et des technologies de stockage. Expérience en script PowerShell pour l'automatisation, connaissance des plateformes cloud (Azure, AWS) ou certifications telles que ITIL, MCSA, VMware VCP sont un atout. Capacité à travailler de manière autonome et en équipe. Solides compétences en résolution de problèmes et souci du détail. Bonnes compétences communicationnelles et sociales. Bonne connaissance orale du néerlandais et du français, niveau B2 en anglais. Rémunération et package de compensation Nous offrons: CDI ou contrat freelance NL vacature op onze website hier: Clinique Saint-Jean - Kliniek Sint-Jan IT System Engineer (M/V/X) | SmartRecruiters Déclaration d'égalité des chances La Clinique Saint-Jean s'engage à promouvoir la diversité et l'inclusivité dans son environnement de travail.

https://www.adzuna.be/details/5619870368.scraped: About Us At HydroVolta, we're providing sustainable water desalination solutions and technologies for both drinking water and industrial water recycling, all powered by our innovative and patented technologies. The Role We are looking for a skilled and motivated Automation Engineer to join our team! In this role, you will be the brain behind our containerized water treatment plants. Your primary task will be to design, program, and implement the control systems that manage our processes, including the PLCs, pumps, valves, and monitoring equipment. You'll be crucial in ensuring our systems run efficiently, reliably, and autonomously. The Role We are looking for a skilled and motivated Automation & Systems Engineer to join our team! In this role, you will be the brain behind our containerized water treatment plants. Your primary task will be to design, program, and implement PC-based control systems that manage our processes, from local PLC logic to integrated data dashboards . You'll be crucial in ensuring our systems run efficiently, reliably, and autonomously in a connected world. What You'll Do Beckhoff Ecosystem: Design and program PLC systems from the ground up using TwinCAT 3 , utilizing Structured Text (ST) and Object-Oriented Programming (OOP) principles. Smart Dashboards: Build modern, responsive HMI interfaces (using TwinCAT HMI / HTML5) for both local operation and remote monitoring. IIoT & Cloud: Implement Cloud connectivity (MQTT, OPC UA) to stream process data to remote dashboards and internal databases. Process Control: Develop and implement control logic for automated sequences involving pumps, valves, sensors, and other critical components. Hardware Integration: Configure EtherCAT networks and integrate various industrial sensors/instrumentation. Collaborate: Work closely with mechanical and chemical engineering teams to ensure seamless system integration and process optimization. Commissioning: Conduct testing of new systems, both in-house and potentially on-site. What We're Looking For Job-Related Competencies: TwinCAT Mastery: Proven experience with Beckhoff TwinCAT 3 and the Visual Studio environment. Web-Tech Savvy: Familiarity with HTML5, CSS, or JavaScript (highly preferred for HMI development). Connectivity: Solid understanding of IoT protocols (MQTT, AMQP) and industrial communication (Modbus, EtherCAT). Electrical Literacy: Ability to read and interpret P&IDs and electrical schematics (EPLAN experience is a plus). Process Background: Experience with water treatment or chemical process control is a significant advantage. Personal Competencies: Hybrid Mindset: You bridge the gap between "Industrial Electrician" and "Software Developer." Analytical & Problem-Solving: You can troubleshoot complex code and hardware issues logically. Independent: You are self-motivated and can take ownership of the entire automation stack. Team Spirit: You communicate well and enjoy collaborating in a dynamic R&D environment.

https://www.adzuna.be/details/5593204044.scraped: Functional / Technical Analyst – Mobile Applications For one of our clients in the financial services sector, we are looking for a Functional / Technical Analyst to join a Mobile DevOps team working on the continuous development of a mobile banking application. Your role As part of an agile DevOps team focused on mobile solutions, you will play a key role in bridging business needs and technical implementation. Your responsibilities include: Analyzing business requirements and translating them into clear functional and technical specifications for mobile applications. Designing and modeling data structures, API interfaces, and object models using UML, ensuring scalability and architectural consistency. Supporting the development process through technical documentation, API specifications (Swagger), and database schema definitions within Oracle environments. Creating wireframes and GUI designs in collaboration with UX designers and front-end developers to deliver intuitive, user-friendly interfaces. Coordinating testing activities by defining test plans, scenarios, acceptance criteria, and supporting functional and technical test execution. Managing and guiding developers within a Scrum framework, acting as owner of technical user stories and ensuring clarity on priorities and requirements. Facilitating communication with stakeholders through refinement sessions, demos, and retrospectives, translating technical topics into business-friendly language. Monitoring progress and quality using sprint metrics, identifying risks, and proposing improvements within DevOps practices. Contributing to the continuous improvement of development processes, tools, and methodologies. Requirements BenefitsWhat’s on offer A supportive and professional working environment that values autonomy, personal growth, and collaboration. Extensive training opportunities, including technical skills, domain knowledge, languages, and personal development. Flexible working hours and the possibility of remote work to support a healthy work-life balance. A competitive salary package with additional benefits such as mobility budget meal vouchers, eco-vouchers, insurance coverage, and flexible benefits. A permanent contract.

https://www.adzuna.be/details/5589144928.scraped: Stellantis e-Transmissions, a member of the Stellantis group, operates in Belgium and the Netherlands, specializing in hybrid transmission manufacturing. With a workforce of over 850 employees, robust R&D with state-of-the-art test facilities, and comprehensive operational capabilities, we are at the forefront of the automotive industry. Our product portfolio includes a range of innovative dual clutch hybrid and conventional transmissions, designed to be affordable and deliver superior driving performance, fuel efficiency, and reduced CO2 emissions. We are currently seeking a Design Release Engineer to join our team. By joining us, you'll be part of a leading company that is shaping the future of hybrid transmission technology. We are looking for a highly motivated Design Release engineer to join our Hydraulics team. In this role, you will be the component owner, focusing on MHEV and PHEV. Note that the position is as well open for a junior or low experience engineer to be trained in the role. Responsibilities designing, developing and releasing hydraulic components for Electric Vehicle (EV), Hybrid Electric Vehicle (HEV), and Plug-in Hybrid Electric Vehicle (PHEV) vehicle applications.
